3104680.name: A tale of terror
3104680.description: A Tale of Terror isn't merely a horror game; it's a meticulously crafted anthology of fear, each chapter presenting a distinct and spine-chilling story. This game is designed to immerse you in a series of haunting narratives, each with its own unique setting, characters, and terrifying twists. Every tale within this collection plunges you into a new realm of horror. As you navigate through these unsettling environments, you'll encounter intricate puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and face terrifying creatures that lurk in the shadows. 'A Tale of Terror' promises a diverse and immersive horror experience that will keep you on the edge of your seat, delivering relentless suspense and unforgettable scares with each new story.
3104680.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
